explanation: This property states that globally, whenever the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), it must concurrently provide a reason for doing so ('provideReason'). This captures the immediate and direct implication of the natural language statement.

This property states that globally, whenever the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), it must concurrently justify this decision ('justifyDecision'). Avoiding an area is a decision, and justifying it directly addresses 'explain why'.

This property states that globally, whenever the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), it must concurrently provide an explanation ('explain'). This is a good general translation for 'explain why'.
This property states that globally, whenever the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), it must concurrently verify why it is doing so ('verifyAction'). This aligns with 'explain why'.

This property states that globally, whenever the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), it must concurrently explain the off-normal condition that led to this avoidance ('explainOffNormal'). Avoiding an area often implies an unusual or problematic situation.

This property states that globally, whenever the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), it should explain the path it is planning to take ('explainPath'). This explanation of the new path serves as a 'why' for deviating from the original.

This property states that globally, whenever the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), it should explain the path it intends to take ('explainIntendedPath'). This explains the revised plan due to avoidance.

This property states that globally, whenever the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), it should explain the path it is currently taking ('explainCurrentPath'). This explanation of the current (deviated) path helps understand the 'why' of the avoidance.

This property states that globally, if the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), then in the very next time step ('X'), it must provide a reason ('provideReason'). This captures a strict immediate explanation following the action.
This property states that globally, if the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), then in the very next time step ('X'), it must justify the decision ('justifyDecision').
This property states that globally, if the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), then in the very next time step ('X'), it must provide an explanation ('explain').
This property states that globally, if the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), then in the very next time step ('X'), it must verify why it is doing so ('verifyAction').
This property states that globally, if the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), then in the very next time step ('X'), it must explain the off-normal condition ('explainOffNormal').
This property states that globally, if the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), then in the very next time step ('X'), it should explain the path it is planning to take ('explainPath').
This property states that globally, if the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), then in the very next time step ('X'), it should explain the path it intends to take ('explainIntendedPath').

This property states that globally, if the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), then in the very next time step ('X'), it should explain the path it is currently taking ('explainCurrentPath').

This property states that globally, if the robot is going to avoid an area in the next state ('X areaAvoided'), it must already be providing a reason ('provideReason') in the current state. This represents a proactive explanation.
This property states that globally, if the robot is going to avoid an area in the next state ('X areaAvoided'), it must already be justifying its decision ('justifyDecision') in the current state.
This property states that globally, if the robot is going to avoid an area in the next state ('X areaAvoided'), it must already be providing an explanation ('explain') in the current state.
This property states that globally, if the robot is going to avoid an area in the next state ('X areaAvoided'), it must already be verifying its action ('verifyAction') in the current state.

This property states that globally, if the robot is avoiding a certain area ('areaAvoided'), it must continue to provide a reason ('provideReason') until it is no longer avoiding that area ('!areaAvoided'). This implies the explanation is concurrent with and persists throughout the avoidance.

This property states that globally, if the robot is avoiding a certain area ('areaAvoided'), it must continue to justify its decision ('justifyDecision') until it is no longer avoiding that area ('!areaAvoided').

This property states that globally, if the robot is avoiding a certain area ('areaAvoided'), it must continue to provide an explanation ('explain') until it is no longer avoiding that area ('!areaAvoided').

This property states that globally, if the robot is avoiding a certain area ('areaAvoided'), it must continue to verify its action ('verifyAction') until it is no longer avoiding that area ('!areaAvoided').

This property states that globally, if the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), then eventually ('F') it must provide a reason ('provideReason'). This is a weaker condition, allowing for a delay in the explanation.
This property states that globally, if the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), then eventually ('F') it must justify the decision ('justifyDecision').
This property states that globally, if the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), then eventually ('F') it must provide an explanation ('explain').

This property states that globally, if the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), then eventually ('F') it should explain the path it intends to take ('explainIntendedPath').
This property states that globally, if the robot avoids a certain area ('areaAvoided'), then eventually ('F') it should explain the path it is currently taking ('explainCurrentPath').
